are the second ones of Gemini and Libra and the first ones of
Leo and Aquarius. Another authority gives them as the first
decanates of Leo and Capricorn. The Fiery ones are : - The
first decanates of Aries, Leo, Scorpio. Capricorn and Aquarius;
the second ones of Cancer and Scorpio: and the last ones of
Leo, Libra. Scorpio and Pisces. These are eleven in all. There
arc six Watery decanates: The first ones of Cancer and Pisces;
the second ones of Virgo and Pisces; and the last ones of Taurus

UESCRIPTION OF DECANATES 213
and Gemini. There are eleven Saumya or beneflc ones ; The
first ones of Gemini, Virgo and Libra; the second ones of Aries.
Taurus, Sagittarius, Capricorn and Aquarius; and the last ones
of Virgo, Sagittarius and Aquarius. There are eight Mixed
decanates. The first ones of Taurus and Sagittarius, the second
ones of Gemini, Leo and Libra, and the last ones of Aries,
Cancer and Capricorn. The 22nd decanate from the rising
